details.prompt: Design cooling pipe in supercritical CO2, 250 BAR
It needs to withstand 300 BAR of pressure and has damped resonance...
High heat flux 150W/cm², forced convection, 280 BAR

diagnosis.root_cause: Structural fatigue leading to micro-cracks in the sensor housing
diagnosis.suggested_strategy: Immediate inspection and potential replacement of the sensor housing to prevent further degradation. Monitor structural_fatigue_index and sensor_noise_delta for additional anomalies.
